sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65471" key="megalo/ptwxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλό-πτωχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n65471.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">magnificently poor</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Διογένης τοὺς μεγάλα καὶ ἀθρόα λαμβάνοντας μεγαλοπτώχους ἐκάλει</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.10.62</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
